min_entry_age.source_quote: age of 3 months and is not older than 65 years of age at the commencement of the Policy Period.

max_entry_age.source_quote: Self, Spouse, Parents, Sister, Brother, In-laws, Aunt, Uncle. 18 years to 65 years lifetime renewals

max_renewal_age.source_quote: 18 years to 65 years lifetime renewals (no maximum renewal age for self/spouse cover)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Maternity sub-limit references SI from Rs.3 lacs to Rs.50 lacs; explicit SI option list not in wording body (per brochure: 1.5 / 3 / 5 / 7.5 / 10 / 15 / 20 / 25 / 50 / 75 / 100 lakhs)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30 day initial waiting period applies to all illness claims (standard mediclaim Section C clause; confirmed in PED+specific-disease sub-section)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified disease/procedure waiting period: 24 months continuous coverage from inception (standard Section C clause in Bajaj wording)

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Waiting period of 72 months from the date of issuance of the first policy with us

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalisation The Medical Expenses incurred during the 60 days immediately before you were Hospitalised

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-Hospitalisation The Medical Expenses incurred during the 90 days immediately after You were discharged post Hospitalisation

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Procedures ... Indicative list of Day Care Procedures is given in the annexure I of Policy

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Hospital: An AYUSH Hospital is a healthcare facility wherein medical/surgical/para-surgical treatment procedures and interventions are carried out by AYUSH Medical Practitioner(s)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 12. Maternity Expenses ... Our maximum liability per delivery or termination shall be limited to the amount specified in the policy Schedule

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Coverage for new born baby will be considered subject to a valid claim being accepted under Maternity Expenses (section A12). ... 90 days from the date of birth

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses (covered as standard section in Bajaj Health Guard Gold)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: 13. Cumulative Bonus: ... We will increase the Limit of Indemnity by 10% of base sum insured per annum ... maximum cumulative increase ... limited to 10 years and 100%

restoration_benefit.value: 100% Sum Insured reinstatement, once per policy year (Sum Insured Reinstatement Benefit)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: 9. Sum Insured Reinstatement Benefit: ... 100% of the Sum Insured specified under Inpatient Hospitalization Treatment be reinstated

room_rent_capping.value: Room rent capping per Sum Insured slab (per Bajaj HG Gold benefit grid; capped on lower SIs, no limit on higher slabs)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room rent, boarding expenses (listed under hospitalization treatment cover with policy-schedule-driven limits)

copayment_pct.source_quote: No mandatory base copayment in Health Guard Gold (only optional voluntary copay/zone-based copay for senior entrants)

deductible_amount.source_quote: No base deductible in Bajaj Health Guard Gold (optional zone/deductible add-ons available)

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; Bajaj Allianz advertises 7,500+ network hospitals on its website (not extracted in this pass)

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: 10. Cashless facility ... a facility extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured ...

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted in this curation pass

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT not specified in policy wording; governed by IRDAI Master Circular 2024

policy_type.source_quote: Limit of Indemnity (indemnity-based health insurance policy)

_meta.notes: Sum Insured option list not enumerated in wording body (referenced via maternity SI grid); insurer-level CSR/network counts null.
